code_snippet: <div class="col-xs-6 col-sm-4 col-md-3" ng-repeat="item in results | orderBy: 'sort'">
ng-options="country.code as country['name_' + currentLang.code] for country in countries"
ng-options="country.code as country['name_' + currentLang.code] for country in countries"
<select ng-options="country.code as country['name_' + currentLang.code] for country in countries"
<a class="btn btn-block btn-social btn-lg btn-google" ng-click="loginGoogle()">
<a class="btn btn-block btn-social btn-lg btn-facebook" ng-click="loginFacebook()">

<input ng-keyup="$event.keyCode == 13 ? email() : null" class="form-control" type="email" autocomplete="on" placeholder="{{ 'email' | translate }}" name="email" ng-model="email" required id="user-email">
<button data-toggle="submit" type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-submit">{{ 'send' | translate }}</button>
<a target="_blank" ng-href="{{ article.link }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary pull-left">{{
<a class="btn btn-block btn-social btn-lg btn-google" ng-click="loginGoogle()">
<a class="btn btn-block btn-social btn-lg btn-facebook" ng-click="loginFacebook()">
<button ng-click="setActiveCategory(item)" ng-class="{active: activeCategoryID == item.ID}" class="btn btn-default">{{ item.langs[currentLang.code].name }}</button>

<div class="col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-12 col-lg-12" ng-class="{ 'col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-6 col-lg-6': attributeDescView == 1, 'col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-6 col-lg-6 col-md-push-6 col-lg-push-6': attributeDescView == 2}" ng-if="attributeDescView != 3">
<div class="col-xs-12 no-padding" ng-repeat="gallery in item.galleries | orderBy: 'order' | filter:hasFormats " ng-if="gallery.items.length > 0">

<div ng-show="activeCategoryID == item.ID || (_.includes(startCategories, item.ID) && mainButtonActive)" class="col-md-3 stickyStyle1 panelRightOrderMax" ng-if="(attributeMenuLeft == 1 && (attributeDescView == 0 || attributeDescView == 3))">
<li class="dropdown" ng-repeat="item2 in menuItems | menutypes | orderBy: 'sort'">

<a href="#" class="dropdown-toggle dropDownMenuLeft" data-target="#z{{item.ID}}menu-{{item2.ID}}" data-toggle="collapse" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="z{{item.ID}}menu-{{item2.ID}}">
<ul class="dropDownMenuLeft-info collapse nav navbar-nav LeftMenuProductsItems" id="z{{item.ID}}menu-{{item2.ID}}">

<div class="col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-12 col-lg-12" ng-class="{ 'col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-6 col-lg-6': attributeDescView == 1, 'col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-6 col-lg-6 col-md-pull-6 col-lg-pull-6': attributeDescView == 2, 'col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-9 col-lg-9': (attributeMenuLeft == 1 && (attributeDescView == 0 || attributeDescView == 3))}">

<div class="col-xs-12 col-sm-4 col-md-3" ng-class="{'col-xs-6 col-sm-4 col-md-3 col-lg-3': ((attributeDescView == 0 || attributeDescView == 3) && attributeMenuLeft == 0), 'col-xs-12 col-sm-12 col-md-6 col-lg-6': ((attributeDescView == 1 || attributeDescView == 2) && attributeMenuLeft == 0), 'col-xs-4 col-sm-4 col-md-4 col-lg-4': attributeMenuLeft == 1}"
<div class="col-xs-12 col-sm-4 col-md-3" ng-class="itemsClassName(product)" ng-repeat="product in products[item.ID] | orderBy: 'sort'">

<a target="_self" class="thumbnail-link" ui-sref="group({categoryurl: item.langs[currentLang.code].url, groupurl: product.slugs[currentLang.code]})" class="product-list-link" ng-if="!product.icons[currentLang.code] && !product.icon">
<a target="_self" ng-if="product.icon" class="thumbnail-link" ui-sref="group({categoryurl: item.langs[currentLang.code].url, groupurl: product.slugs[currentLang.code]})">
<div class="col-xs-12 no-padding" ng-repeat="gallery in item.galleries | orderBy: 'order' | filter:hasFormats " ng-if="gallery.items.length > 0">
<tr ng-repeat="row in filteredOptions" class="paperRow" ng-click="onPaperDefaultClick(row)" ng-class="{'choosenRow': row.ID == choosenTypeID}">
